name: aurasunglasses-root
description: Root configuration for Aura Sunglasses project

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix venderFrontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:vendor"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix venderFrontend
